audit_items.proof_trace: Fulu blocks skip blob KZG validation before calling computeCells. Lines 115-131 validate blobs only for Deneb/Electra forks, while Fulu path (L155-193) directly broadcasts data columns without validating the source blobs. Invalid blobs from local EL will produce invalid data columns.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Malicious/buggy local EL provides blob with KZG commitment mismatch. Validator calls assemble_data_column_sidecars which invokes computeCells without validation (peerdas_helpers.nim:325), producing invalid cells that are broadcast to the network, corrupting DAS data availability.
